name: edit_reminder
description: Edit one reminder by stable ID using supported remindctl patch fields.

reminder_id.description: Reminder ID or accepted ID prefix.

due.description: Optional due date/time accepted by remindctl.

alarm.description: Optional alarm date/time accepted by remindctl.

repeat.description: Optional recurrence rule such as weekly or every 3 days.

priority.description: Optional priority: none, low, medium, or high.

complete.description: Mark the reminder complete when true.

incomplete.description: Mark the reminder incomplete when true.

clear_due.description: Clear the due date when true.
